hero.headlineIndustrial: Precision rolling tools built to your drawings
hero.subtitle: Expert engineering, CNC machining, and overhaul services for precision roll forming tooling and tube mill machinery. Built to your exact drawings and tolerances, from a single custom roller to complete production lines.

items.title: Custom Rolling Tools
items.description: Precision-machined rollers, dies, and forming tools cut to your profile and material, finished to mirror tolerance for tube and pipe mills.

items.title: Machine Design & Construction
items.description: Complete roll-forming and tube mill machinery built from the ground up -- stands, drives, and tooling integrated into a ready-to-run line.
items.imageAlt: Blue CHP roll-forming machine line with stainless steel rollers under assembly

items.title: Modification & Overhaul
items.description: Re-machining, refurbishment, and upgrades that restore worn tooling and ageing lines to original spec -- extending the life of your equipment.

process.heading: A clear path from drawing to delivery
process.subheading: A transparent, engineer-led workflow that keeps procurement teams informed at every stage.

steps.title: Submit drawings
steps.description: Send blueprints, samples, or a worn part. Our engineers review feasibility and confirm materials.

steps.title: Design & quote
steps.description: We reverse-engineer or design from scratch, then return a detailed quote within 48 hours.

steps.title: CNC manufacturing
steps.description: In-house turning, milling, grinding, and finishing on calibrated CNC machinery to tight tolerance.

steps.title: Inspect & deliver
steps.description: Every piece is dimensionally inspected and finish-checked before packing and dispatch.

industries.heading: Trusted by manufacturers who form steel every day
industries.subheading: Wherever metal is rolled, formed, or shaped, our tooling keeps the line running. We supply OEMs and production facilities across a broad range of sectors.

about.heading: CHP Rolling Engineering Limited Partnership
about.description: We are a specialist rolling engineering workshop dedicated to custom, made-to-order solutions. Our team combines decades of hands-on forming experience with modern CNC manufacturing to build tooling and machinery that performs exactly as designed.

points.title: Engineer-led quality
points.description: Documented inspection on every part, with materials and tolerances verified to your specification.

points.title: Precision finishing
points.description: Mirror-finished, dimensionally accurate tooling that runs cleaner and lasts longer on the line.

points.title: Partnership approach
points.description: We work directly with your procurement and engineering teams from first drawing to final delivery.

footer.description: CHP Rolling Engineering Limited Partnership — 100% custom, made-to-order rolling tools, machinery, and overhaul services for steel forming lines.
footer.copyright: CHP Rolling Engineering Limited Partnership. All rights reserved.

customRollingTools.heading: Custom-Made Pipe & Tube Roll Forming Tooling
customRollingTools.description: We deliver engineered solutions to solve problems caused by off-spec imported rollers and machinery limitations. By utilizing high-quality Japanese JIS SKD11 Tool Steel, processed with high-pressure hardening and high-precision CNC grinding, we achieve the tightest tolerances. This guarantees extended tooling lifespan and long-term reduction in maintenance costs.

items.title: Pipe Forming Roller
items.description: Design, CNC turn, and form rollers for round and square tubes. We maintain exact profile geometries with micron-level precision to ensure smooth forming of steel and stainless steel, minimizing surface scratches.
items.imageAlt: Steel pipe forming roller manufactured by CHP Rolling Engineering from Japanese JIS SKD11 steel

items.title: Roll Forming Dies
items.description: Support complex structural geometries. High-resolution surface grinding ensures stable and consistent cross-sectional dimensions across your entire production line, virtually eliminating dimensional deviations.
items.imageAlt: High precision custom roll forming dies for structural steel shape forming

items.title: Multi-Stage Rollers
items.description: We calculate and engineer comprehensive rolling stages designed to integrate seamlessly with your existing machinery. This systematic approach ensures optimal metal forming without deformation.
items.imageAlt: JIS SKD11 multi-stage roll forming dies manufactured based on custom drawing

machineConstruction.heading: Hybrid Tube Mill Machinery: Configurable up to 4-Roll Systems
machineConstruction.description: Elevate your heavy industry production efficiency with our Hybrid Squeeze Stand technology. Engineered and manufactured to accommodate variable forming directions, it allows seamless operation of up to 4-Roll Squeeze Systems within a single structure. This innovation significantly reduces Capital Expenditure (CapEx) and maximizes floor space. Built with heavy-duty structural steel, it is custom-ready for integration into premium tube and pipe production lines.

items.title: Multi-Configuration Machine Stands
items.description: Heavy-duty machine stands constructed with thick structural steel. Advanced mechanical design ensures symmetrical roller positioning, guaranteeing perfectly squared and highly accurate pipe dimensions.
items.imageAlt: Custom hybrid 4-roll tube mill squeeze stand design by CHP Rolling Engineering

items.title: Heavy Duty Gear Transmission
items.description: High-torque multi-stage gear transmission systems designed to withstand heavy-load compression. Integrates seamlessly with advanced PLC logic controllers for reliable continuous operation.

items.title: Proven Modular Parts
items.description: Proven in full-scale on-site commissioning. The shaft support, bearings, and shaft axis feature a modular design for easy assembly and disassembly, engineered to handle extreme mechanical stress and torque.
items.imageAlt: High precision custom gear parts and modular shaft assemblies for roll forming machines

maintenanceOverhaul.heading: Comprehensive Overhaul & Maintenance for Roll Forming Machinery
maintenanceOverhaul.description: Minimize risk and financial loss from machinery downtime and parts scarcity. Our expert engineering team provides rigorous on-site mechanical and hydraulic system diagnostics. We design and manufacture Custom Parts to replace worn components. We specialize in maintenance, capability expansion (Modification), and complete system restoration (Overhaul) for all production lines—including proprietary systems and imported machinery (China, Taiwan, Europe)—restoring them to peak operational performance.

items.title: Urgent On-Site Diagnostics
items.description: Immediate diagnostic services for tolerance deviation. We conduct in-depth analysis of roller shafts and drive systems to precisely and rapidly resolve tube deformation issues.
items.imageAlt: On-site diagnostic and repair service for industrial roll forming machinery by CHP Rolling Engineering

items.title: Modification & Upgrades
items.description: Modify and upgrade existing machinery or production lines to accommodate new roller sizes and adjustable clearances, expanding your manufacturing capabilities without the need for new capital equipment.
items.imageAlt: Mechanical modification of stainless steel pipe roll forming lines for factory automation

items.title: Complete System Overhaul
items.description: Comprehensive dismantling, bearing replacement, and restoration of worn shafts. We re-grind all support stands to completely overhaul your production line, restoring micron-level operational accuracy.
items.imageAlt: Complete overhaul and machine rebuilding service for heavy-duty industrial roll forming machinery at CHP factory

businessOffice.heading: Business Office & Deep Engineering Coordination Center
businessOffice.description1: Because specialized engineering and custom-made manufacturing require absolute precision, CHP Rolling Engineering has established a dedicated Business Office for seamless coordination with our partners' procurement and engineering teams. This space is designed for intensive meetings, mechanical drawing analysis, and meticulous material specification reviews, ensuring 100% alignment and accuracy before entering actual production.
businessOffice.description2: We are committed to delivering precise engineering solutions that maximize the return on every investment you make.

contactInfo.addressValue: 790/77 Moo 2, Soi Pracha Uthit 90, Pracha Uthit Rd., Ban Khlong Suan, Phra Samut Chedi, Samut Prakan 10290
